explanation: The diagram shows a small set of clearly separated infrastructure components (Zuul, Config Center, Eureka, RabbitMQ, Spring Boot Admin, Hystrix Dashboard, Zipkin) and two business services (Service-A and Service-B) deployed as replicated instances. No single business service appears to accumulate many distinct responsibilities or excessive dependencies relative to the others. The central components are typical platform/infrastructure services rather than evidence of one greedy microservice.
